rationale: Section 11.49 governs legal title effects of homestead exemption applications by heir property owners. It contains no dollar thresholds and is unaffected by changing the exemption amount in §11.13(b).
quote: The grant or denial of an application by an heir property owner for a residence homestead exemption under this chapter does not affect the legal title of the property subject to the application and does not operate to transfer title to that property.
_note: No dollar amount or operative threshold in §11.49 references the exemption amount; the proposed change to §11.13(b) does not interact with this provision.
